settings.shortcutsDesc: Customize shortcuts for frequent actions. Click a shortcut to change it.
settings.planDesc: Manage your Rush plan and upgrade at any time.
settings.planHistoryDesc: Your invoices from the last 12 months.
settings.planAxis1Desc: Choose your plan. Switch at any time.
settings.planAxis2Desc: Each plan includes a base quota. Add extra blocks as needed.
settings.paymentMethodsDesc: Configure the payment methods offered to your clients in the portal and on invoices. Enable, disable, or customize each method.
settings.billingDesc: Default values used when creating each new invoice.
settings.defaultNotesPlaceholder: e.g. Thank you for your business!
settings.taxLinesDesc: Define the taxes applied by default on each invoice.
settings.studioInfoDesc: Enter your studio's general information. It appears on your invoices and in the client portal.
settings.studioLogosDesc: Upload your logos to use in documents and the client portal.
settings.fullLogoHint: Recommended: PNG with transparent background, horizontal ratio.
settings.squareLogoHint: Used as favicon and in the portal sidebar.
settings.portalDesc: Customize the appearance of the portal shared with your clients.
settings.portalAccentColorDesc: Applied in real time on the portal and interface. Use a contrasted color for good readability.
settings.portalPreviewDesc: The color is applied immediately across the entire interface.
settings.profileDesc: Manage your personal information and profile photo.
settings.notificationsDesc: Choose how and when to receive notifications for each event type.
settings.notificationsHint: Email notifications are sent only for important events and cannot be disabled for urgent reminders.
settings.securityDesc: Manage your password, two-factor authentication, and active sessions.
settings.securityPreviewNoticeSuffix: — security actions are disabled. In production, these settings will be connected to your real account.
settings.twoFactorAuthDesc: Strengthen your account security with a one-time code.
settings.fontsDesc: Customize the interface fonts. Changes apply immediately.
settings.headingFontDesc: Used for titles, headers, and visually important elements.
settings.bodyFontDesc: Used for body text, buttons, and interfaces.
settings.previewBodySample: Body text — readable, balanced, suited for long reading in the interface.
settings.integrationsDesc: Connect Rush to your work tools to sync data automatically.
settings.googleCalendarDesc: Sync your Rush events with Google Calendar and vice versa.
settings.gcalFeatureAutoAdd: Automatic addition of Rush events to your Google Calendar
settings.integrationSlackDesc: Receive Rush notifications directly in your channels.
settings.integrationNotionDesc: Export your projects and tasks to Notion.
settings.integrationDropboxDesc: Sync your files with your Dropbox space.
settings.integrationZapierDesc: Automate your workflows with thousands of apps.
settings.pluginsDesc: Extend Rush directly in your post-production tools.
settings.premiereDesc: Rush panel in Adobe Premiere Pro to access comments and approvals without leaving the app.
settings.premiereFeatureComments: Display comments linked to each sequence
settings.resolveDesc: External Rush script for DaVinci Resolve — sync your feedback with your timeline.
settings.resolveFeaturePanel: Rush feedback panel inside DaVinci Resolve
settings.resolveFeatureTimecode: Timeline markers synced with Rush comments
settings.resolveFeatureSync: Real-time sync between Rush and DaVinci
settings.howItConnectsDesc: The plugin uses an API key to connect to your Rush workspace. Copy this key and paste it into the plugin settings after installation.

pricing.title: Transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Grow at your own pace.
pricing.membersNote: Studio: +$3 CA/month per additional team member (from the 3rd on). Agency: +$2 CA/month (from the 3rd on). Guests and clients on the portal always remain unlimited and free, on every plan.
pricing.featCreativeIntegrations: Reviews in Premiere Pro & DaVinci Resolve
pricing.calcSubtitle: Adjust the number of team members and storage — the price updates live.
pricing.calcGuestsNote: Guests and clients on the portal are always unlimited and free, regardless of plan.
pricing.calcSeatsIncludedNote: 2 members included in the base price
pricing.selfHostDesc: Keep full control of your data. Install Rush on your own server — even a Raspberry Pi — instead of paying for a cloud subscription.
pricing.selfHostLicenseFeat2: No limit on users or projects
pricing.selfHostLicenseFeat3: Your data never leaves your infrastructure
pricing.selfHostUpdatesFeat3: Cancel anytime — you keep the current version
pricing.faq1Q: Can I change plans at any time?
pricing.faq1A: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade from your settings. Changes take effect immediately.
pricing.faq2Q: What happens to my content if I downgrade?
pricing.faq2A: Your data is preserved. Excess projects are archived (not deleted) until you upgrade again.
pricing.faq3Q: Is storage really separate from features?
pricing.faq3A: Yes — intentionally. You only pay for the storage you actually use, independently of your feature plan.
pricing.faq4A: No. Displayed price = final price (+ applicable taxes). Cancel anytime, no penalty.
pricing.ctaDesc: No credit card required for the free plan.
